review_title: ChatBot works for you when you can't
description: Overall it was a good experiance the ChatBot knows it's stuff and is extremly helpful in managing customer support.
author: Desiree G.
pros: Easy to use and set up. You can also sign up for free. One of the best features is that you give it your webpage and it learns everything it can about your services and products and can answer queastions all day even when you are not avaliable. It's also great for use with diffrent languages.
cons: The price is crazy. Even the smallest package is more expensive than most.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: This is a great software! My company loved it because we gave our attendees a personal experience as we logged in as ourselves. We were able to "say hi" to attendees while they were looking around the platform. This gave the attendees an "in-person" feel as if we saw them at an in-person conference. The analytics were great and we gained a lot of knowledge about our attendees and how we can improve our event for next time.
author: Lauren B.
pros: I loved the canned responses. We were able to answer our attendees not only quickly, but with the correct response as well. Users were able to gain analytics from the system about where our attendees were from and what type of computer or phone they were using. This helped when they asked us to troubleshoot some issues on our other platform. Users were able to see what attendees were writing so they could pre-empt the question and get the information over to the attendee faster.
cons: The billing process starts when you order the software. This was difficult for us because one of our conferences landed in between the billing period. Therefore, it meant we would have to pay for 2 months of the program when we only needed it for one. We were able to speak with their team and figured out a solution which was great.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: It is great because it is excellent at understanding natural language and providing instant responses, which is vital in our industry.
author: Rachel M.
pros: Chatbot is a awesome tool because it is innovative, and easy to tailor our needs for clients who need to chat in about patients.
cons: I dont have complaints on it so far. We've been using it for a while and the benefits have been pretty good
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: I am not a huge fan. Maybe once AI becomes better, I will enjoy using ChatBot more than talking to a person.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: ChatBot allows you to ask questions without waiting for a customer service representative. It is instant.
cons: I don't like how the ChatBot presents many drop down menus for a problem I may have. I want the ChatBot to be able to answer without me tailoring the responses for it.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

author: Riley R.
pros: It easy very easy to text and email friends, coworkers, and family. I like to use the chat feature very often.
cons: It takes a while to learn how to use the chatbot feature which makes it hard to see the value for money for usage.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Azizah A.
pros: The chatbot is not too demanding to use. After establishing a few encounters, you'll be well on your way to executing many more. It's simple to get started training the bot, and looking back on old conversations can reveal any problems with the answer sequence and easy to fix the wrong sequence.
cons: The most glaring drawback of ChatBot is that it cannot deal with more complicated customer dissatisfaction scenarios, limiting its usefulness to website users with simple troubles only.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Chatbot gives me more confidence in asking questions and getting my questions resolved and allows me to have less interaction with a human. No one is judging you on the questions being asked.
author: Carlin T.
pros: I love that the chatbot is 24/7 availability. Help increase customer response and interaction. Chatbot provides quick answers and reduces human interaction.
cons: Chatbots can struggle with complex queries, in which can lead to inaccurate results or responses. No human interaction involved.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Favorable and easy to use. I like the many different options chat bot offers.
author: Joshua P.
pros: Variety, ease of use and flexibility. Having AI to help really makes the difference.
cons: Human use. The strictly AI aspect of it is what makes it so great.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Horrible product and horrible customer service
description: They have horrible customer service. I have been a customer with ChatBot for years and our account expired. I accidentally upgraded and requested to cancel with refund almost immediately. Did not even use any of the features at all. Of course they DECLINED to refund or even pro rate. Horrible. Do not use them. If this is how they treat their customers, then they don't deserve to be in business.
author: Ash S.
pros: None. Horrible product, not easy to use, not functional, expensive and limited features, and most of all, horrible customer service.
cons: They treated me (a loyal customer) poorly.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy intergration with other apps. Also can be programmed to provide automatic replies which is very easy to understand.
cons: Sometimes it is too complicated to understand especially when it has to connect you to the actual person.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Micah S.
pros: ChatBot saves an incredible amount of time and helps with planning and organizing. Can create multiple business ideas and plans in seconds that can sometimes just give you the creative mind to come up with a new plan.
cons: Sometimes information is outdated. It does not do well with super up to date things if there is not enough information out on a particular topic.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Patbot for Windows PC by Langsoft, Switzerland
description: The chatbot can be used to occupy the customer while waiting in the waiting room and to answer questions the customer wants to know about your business.
author: Hristo G.
pros: Easy to use console application. The Patbot Dialogue System provides probable and accurate answers to questions. The answers are probable when the System does not have sufficient information to provide an accurate answer. For example, if we ask "Where are my trousers?", the answer will be "Probably in the wardrobe". Of course, the trousers can be also in the washing machine, hanged to dry after washing, etc. The dialogue with the System can be continued only if the user asks something or tells something, in writing. The System will not start the conversation first and will not continue the conversation by itself. The Dialogue System can remember the following user information, such as location of a key, medicament and money. For example, if the user writes "My blood pressure medicament is on the table.", the System will remember where is the medicament. If the user forgets where is his blood pressure medicament, the user can ask the System "Where is my blood pressure medicament?". The System will retrieve the information. This ability of the chatbot can be extended to cover any valuable information.
cons: Improvement is an endless task, which every developer faces all the time.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: No sé como hemos vivido sin él tanto tiempo
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Es un programa fácil de usar y manejar, nos ayudó enormemente a aumentar la conversión de nuestras landing page y hacer crecer las ventas. Nos permitió interactuar con los clientes que visitaban nuestras webs y darles ese empujoncito para que compraran.
cons: Algunas opciones están muy limitadas, como la multirespuesta por ejemplo, y el diseño del flujo de conversación puede ser algo lioso. Es una herramienta que ayuda pero la calidad de los leads no es la ideal
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: An effective and unique chat bot that offers a lot of features
description: It was a very enjoyable experience for me. I tried many similar tools and the chatbot stood out due to its professional look and feel (and also the advanced feature set). Although it has many advanced features, it is designed with beginners in mind as well, so you can get started quickly and make it more advanced as you progress and learn more about the platform. This is a powerful tool that boosted my engagement on the site and lead generation.
author: abdo L.
pros: I like the combination of channels here: you can use a chatbot on your website, on Messenger, through Slack and you can also have a real real conversation. Great for one tool. Instead of having to buy multiple tools, you can start with it. The interface is very modern and easy to use, that's what I like. It seems to be a nice place also for visitors. This has a premium look and feel, which is good for my business' reputation.
cons: Learning Academy and Help Topics are not sufficient to train you in the use of this product. It took a lot of fumbling (and still is) on how to figure out what to do and how to train a chatbot. Also - the support is only available through email, and it would be very helpful if you could get real-time help.... You might think that a chat producer would have the ability to LiveChat with their customers!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: User Friendly Customer Based Automated Communicator For Communicating FAQs
description: ChatBot has been a part of my online shopping life and learning life for many years. Typically it is an automated secretary that can answer “frequently asked questions”. That is useful. However, often it is only another hurdle for an impatient to get over in order to ask the Human Sales Department about something more specific or more personal.
author: Michael B.
pros: ChatBot is User Friendly Customer Based Automated Communicator For Communicating FAQs. It’s most useful when it knows exactly what to answer and saves the hassle of having to seek elsewhere or to call Customer summer service or to read FAQs. If it does not know the answer, it typically gives you the option to “request customer service”. It ran smoothly.
cons: ChatBot often asks far too many unnecessary questions. It often is preprogrammed with far too long and irrelevant answers. At times it refuses to redirect to a human CSR.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

description: A worthy investment. It will make sure to capture maximum leads possible. You can change to fit your business needs.
author: Hanaa I.
pros: It is a good software to get in as many leads as possible. We use this on our newly launched business website. We love it so far. The question can be personalized to provide the necessary guidance also, make leads to conversions. It can be easily integrated. Live chat for the audience at any time.
cons: So far we have not faced any issue with regards to Chatbot. It works fine.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Enable us focus on the bigger issues.
author: Shola A.
pros: Simple and intuitive user interface, which ensures we were able to adopt Livechat's Botengine in a matter of minutes. BotEngine enable us create our own chatbot on our website,which fits into our own demand by simply creating new chatbot scenarios .Overall ,it ensures we respond to our customers on chat faster ,as it helps us resolve simple helpdesk issues why leaving the complicated issues for our helpdesk team to sort out.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Chatbot reduced the amount of customer enquiry which our sales agents respond to at a given time.Most especially during the weekends,our Chatbot assistant does most of the “attending to website visitor’ task and accomplishes then effectively,bearing in mind that this is a bot and not an human.
author: Anuolu Y.
pros: I like how Livechat recently introduced us to Chabot experts,these experts assists sales teams like ours to design,build and deploy a chatbot assistant ,ensuring that our current chatbot is tailor made for our business and delivers guided conversational experience to our customers and website visitors alike.
cons: Nothing to dislike as regards our use of Chatbot.It just keeps getting better.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Pedro A.
pros: ChatBot lo ayuda a tener conversaciones similares a las humanas con clientes y clientes. El uso de un chatbot puede eliminar el trabajo de la oficina principal. Puede ser la voz de la empresa y múltiples sesiones de trabajo.
cons: Mucho cuidado con el tono de voz que representará su negocio, ya sea suave, fuerte, etc. Hágalo lo más agradable que pueda para maximizar la interacción con el cliente.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Chatbot was really a good option for quick and easy launch of chatbots. The features like Online Quick Chat conversation, Easy Avatar and Media customization, Good API Integration with FB Page, Website, WhatsApp, Telegram, etc., Good Readymade Templates, Quick AI Response to chats, Easy drag n Drop Chat Flow made it proper for any type of use.
author: Anish C.
pros: 1. Online Quick Chat conversation 2. Easy Avatar and Media customization 3. Good API Integration with FB Page, Website, WhatsApp, Telegram, etc. 4. Good Readymade Templates 5. Quick AI Response to chats 6. Easy drag n Drop Chat Flow
cons: 1. API Integration requires 3rd party subscriptions and access (eg: WhatsApp) 2. Chatbot preview gets changed and may differ platform to platform 3. Need to keep a regular check in to Chat Flow 4. Free Trial should include more storage/chat support
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Its a great experience and the customer service is the best.
author: April O.
pros: The ease of setting up of chat bot and the analytics to use in research to learn more about the customer.
cons: The company doesn't really advertise to everyone so the normal person is unaware of this software being out there.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Leo P.
pros: integration with customers is very easy and we can use all previous channel that we have already online.
cons: there are no cons in my case, but I will investigate thoroughly
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Chatbot gives awesome customer service experience
description: Regular customer service communication is made easy with chatbot.
author: Jessica B.
pros: Being able to reach service providers without the stress of phone lines malfunctioning and being put on hold endlessly.
cons: Having to deal with different agent each time I am relating same problem to a service provider.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

author: Lauren B.
pros: The website had it set up to a couple clicks and I was talking to someone.
cons: Nothing in particular. Had no issues with it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Professional chat bot tool that does so much more
description: Overall a very pleasant experience for me. I experimented with multiple similar tools and Chatbot stood out because of its professional look and feel (and also advanced feature set). While there are many advanced features, it's built with the beginners in mind as well, so that you can quickly get started and make it more advanced as you progress and learn more about the platform. This is a solid tool that boosted my on-site engagement and lead generation.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like the combination of channels here: you can use Chatbot on your website, on Messenger, through Slack and you can even do a real live chat as well. Pretty cool for ONE tool. Instead of having to purchase multiple tools you can just get started with this. The interface is very modern and easy to use, that's what I like. It looks pretty slick also for your visitors. This has a premium look and feel, which is good for the reputation of my business.
cons: There are some limitations depending on your plan, but overall there's very little to dislike. I can't find things that disturb me. There are plenty of options for each budget and you can use this tool as a complete beginner or expert. It doesn't matter what your skill level is. I like how the tool is frequently updated as well.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years
